top_items.title: Introducing multi-cluster GKE Inference Gateway: Scale AI workloads around the world
top_items.one_liner: Announces preview of multi-cluster GKE Inference Gateway for scalable, resilient AI/ML inference workloads across regions.

top_items.title: BigQuery Studio is more useful than ever, with enhanced Gemini assistant
top_items.one_liner: Highlights enhanced Gemini assistant in BigQuery Studio for streamlining data management and analysis tasks.

top_items.title: Google Cloud and NVIDIA expand AI innovation across industries at GTC 2026
top_items.one_liner: Google Cloud and NVIDIA expand AI innovation, co-engineering infrastructure for agentic AI and MoE architectures.
